prompt: slidev 슬라이드에서 다크 배경 위에 카드 형태 레이아웃을 만들고 싶어. bg-slate-800 같은 배경에 둥근 모서리, 그림자 효과를 주고 v-click으로 하나씩 나타나게 하고 싶어. UnoCSS 클래스를 어떻게 쓰면 돼?

assertions.name: unocss-bg-classes
assertions.description: Uses appropriate background classes (bg-slate-800, bg-gray-800/50, etc.)
assertions.check: contains bg-slate or bg-gray background classes

assertions.name: rounded-shadow-classes
assertions.description: Uses rounded and shadow utility classes
assertions.check: contains rounded-lg or rounded-xl AND shadow-lg or shadow-xl

assertions.name: v-click-card-integration
assertions.description: Shows v-click on individual cards for progressive reveal
assertions.check: v-click is applied to card div elements

assertions.name: working-slide-example
assertions.description: Provides a complete, copy-pasteable slide code example
assertions.check: contains a complete slide with --- separators and frontmatter

assertions.name: dark-mode-awareness
assertions.description: Mentions dark mode or dark: prefix for theme compatibility
assertions.check: mentions dark mode, dark: prefix, or dark theme consideration

assertions.name: padding-spacing
assertions.description: Uses padding and margin classes for proper card spacing
assertions.check: contains p-4/p-6 and gap/mt/mb spacing classes
